rationale: Educ. Code §29.099 governs a math intervention pilot program. It contains no provisions tied to homestead exemption amounts or property tax revenue, so increasing the §11.13(b) exemption creates no direct conflict.
quote: Sec. 29.099. INTENSIVE MATHEMATICS AND ALGEBRA INTERVENTION PILOT PROGRAM.
_note: No direct or indirect reference to homestead exemptions, property tax values, or school funding formulas in this statute.
